plan: Contact the retailer's customer service via phone, chat, or email and identify yourself as Sofia Li, residing in San Antonio, 78260.
State clearly that you want to return a digital camera you received and request a full refund to the original payment method.
Provide the order number #W8855135 as your best guess, but acknowledge you are not 100% certain — ask the agent to look up your order by name, email, or address if the number is wrong.
Confirm the correct order once the agent locates it, and verify the item matches the digital camera you received.
State your reason for the return (e.g., unwanted, defective, changed mind — whichever applies) so the agent can select the correct return type.
Insist specifically on a refund to the original payment method, not store credit or an exchange, and confirm the agent has recorded this preference.
Ask the agent to initiate the return, obtain a return merchandise authorization (RMA) number or prepaid shipping label, and confirm the return address.
Ask for the expected refund timeline and request a confirmation email summarizing the return and refund details.
Ship the camera back using the provided label or instructions, keeping the tracking number for your records.
Follow up if the refund does not appear within the stated timeframe, referencing the RMA number and tracking confirmation.
